scripts.dev:backend: uv run --project apps/backend uvicorn app.main:app --app-dir apps/backend --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:migrate: uv run --project apps/backend alembic -c apps/backend/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:check: uv run --project apps/backend alembic -c apps/backend/alembic.ini check
scripts.db:revision: uv run --project apps/backend alembic -c apps/backend/alembic.ini revision --autogenerate
scripts.typecheck:backend: uv run --project apps/backend mypy --config-file apps/backend/pyproject.toml apps/backend/app apps/backend/tests
